hero.subtitle: Redefining how Tunisia celebrates. We bridge the gap between visionary planners and exceptional vendors.

story.subtitle: Discover how OSS Events became the reference for event organization in Tunisia.
story.p1: In 2024, at the heart of Tunis, a simple but ambitious idea took shape: to create a unique platform that would bring together the best event providers in Tunisia and make them accessible to everyone.
story.p2: Faced with the complexity of organizing an event — wedding, birthday, seminar or family celebration — we wanted to simplify this experience. Our mission: to connect organizers with trusted professionals, verified and passionate about their craft.
story.p3: Today, OSS Events accompanies thousands of Tunisian families and businesses in realizing their most important projects. Every successful event reinforces our commitment to providing the best possible service.
story.quote: Every event is a unique story. Our role is to help you write it with the best partners.

cta.title: Ready to Create Your Dream Event?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of organizers who trust our platform for their most precious moments.

why_us.subtitle: Our platform is designed to save you time and guarantee you an exceptional planning experience.
why_us.search_desc: Find the ideal provider in just a few clicks with our advanced filters.
why_us.save_time_desc: Compare, contact, and book all your providers from a single platform.
why_us.quality_desc: Each provider is verified and evaluated by our community.

journey.p1: Founded in 2024, OSS Events was born from a simple observation: planning an event in Tunisia was unnecessarily complicated. Disconnected vendors, opaque pricing, and lack of trust were the norm.
journey.p2: We set out to change that. By building a platform that prioritizes transparency, quality, and ease of use, we've revolutionized how people connect with event professionals.
journey.testimonial: OSS Events made planning my wedding a breeze!

values.excellence_desc: We strive for perfection in every detail, ensuring that every event we touch is nothing short of spectacular.
values.passion_desc: We love what we do, and that passion reflects in the quality of our service and the relationships we build.
values.innovation_desc: We are constantly exploring new ideas and technologies to make event planning easier and more exciting.

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.q1: How do I create an account on EventsHub?
getting_started.a1: Creating an account is simple! Click the 'Sign Up' button in the top right corner, fill in your basic information including name, email, and password. You'll receive a verification email to confirm your account. Once verified, you can start exploring vendors and services immediately.
getting_started.q2: What types of events does EventsHub cater to?
getting_started.a2: EventsHub serves a wide variety of events including weddings, corporate conferences, birthday parties, baby showers, anniversaries, graduations, and cultural celebrations. We connect you with specialized vendors for each type of occasion to ensure your event is perfectly tailored to your needs.
getting_started.q3: Is there a fee to use EventsHub?
getting_started.a3: Basic account creation and browsing services are completely free. We charge a small service fee only when you book services through our platform, which helps us maintain quality vendor relationships and provide excellent customer support.

booking.title: Booking & Payments
booking.q1: How do I book a vendor through EventsHub?
booking.a1: Browse our vendor directory, select your preferred service providers, and click 'Book Now'. You'll be guided through our secure booking process where you can select dates, specify requirements, and make payments. All bookings are confirmed directly with vendors through our system.
booking.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
booking.a2: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), bank transfers, and digital wallets. All payments are processed securely through our encrypted payment gateway. You'll receive instant confirmation and detailed receipts for all transactions.
booking.q3: Can I modify or cancel my booking?
booking.a3: Yes, modifications and cancellations depend on the vendor's policy and timing. Most vendors allow changes up to 48-72 hours before the event. Cancellation policies vary by service type - check each vendor's specific terms during the booking process.

vendors.title: Vendors & Services
vendors.q1: How do you verify vendor credentials?
vendors.a1: All vendors undergo a rigorous verification process including business registration checks, insurance verification, portfolio review, and customer reference checks. We also monitor ongoing performance through customer reviews and ratings to maintain quality standards.
vendors.q2: What if I'm not satisfied with a vendor's service?
vendors.a2: We have a comprehensive satisfaction guarantee program. If you're not happy with a vendor's service, contact our support team within 48 hours. We'll work with you to resolve issues, arrange alternative services, or process refunds according to our satisfaction policy.
vendors.q3: Can I request custom services not listed?
vendors.a3: Absolutely! Many vendors offer custom packages and specialized services. Use our 'Request Custom Quote' feature to describe your specific needs, and we'll connect you with vendors who can accommodate unique requirements.

technical.title: Technical Support
technical.q1: How do I reset my password?
technical.a1: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email address, and we'll send you a secure password reset link. The link expires after 24 hours for security purposes. If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support.
technical.q2: The website isn't loading properly. What should I do?
technical.a2: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies, then refresh the page. Ensure you're using the latest version of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge. If issues persist, try accessing from a different device or network. Contact our technical support team for further assistance.
technical.a3: We take security very seriously. All personal data is encrypted using industry-standard SSL technology. We never share your information with third parties without explicit consent. Our privacy policy details exactly how we collect, use, and protect your information.

intro.title: Your Privacy Matters
intro.description: At EventsHub, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.item1: Name, email address, and contact information

protection.title: Data Protection & Security
protection.p1: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information:

encryption.label: Encryption:
encryption.desc: All data transmission uses SSL/TLS encryption

access.label: Access Control:
access.desc: Strict access controls limit who can view your information

compliance.label: Compliance:
compliance.desc: Adherence to GDPR and local data protection laws

access.title: Access & Correction
access.desc: Request access to your personal data or correct inaccurate information

portability.title: Data Portability
portability.desc: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format

deletion.title: Deletion
deletion.desc: Request deletion of your personal information

objection.title: Objection
objection.desc: Object to processing of your personal data

contact.title: Contact and Support
contact.p1: For questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer:

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.p1: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Significant changes will be communicated through our platform or via email.
